sql.trim: t1.USER_POST, t1.SESSION_NAME, t1.USER_PARTY_TIME, t1.USER_SEX, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.SESSION_TIME, t1.ATTR9, t1.USER_ADD_TIME, t1.ATTR4, t1.PARTY_NAME, t1.SESSION_TYPE, t1.ATTR3, t1.ATTR2, t1.ATTR1, t1.ID, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.ATTR8, t1.ATTR7, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.ATTR6, t1.ATTR5, t1.USER_NUMBER_VOTES, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.ATTR12, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.ATTR13, t1.ATTR10, t1.ATTR11, t1.ATTR16, t1.ATTR17, t1.ATTR14, t1.ATTR15, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.ATTR18, t1.ATTR19, t1.USER_NAME, t1.USER_RANKS, t1.USER_TYPE, t1.VERSION, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.SESSION_ID, t1.PARTY_ID, t1.USER_WORK_DATE,

mapper.select:
select
from DYN_SESSION_WYFG t1
and t1.id in
#{item}
order by t1.creation_date desc
mapper.insert:
insert into DYN_SESSION_WYFG
USER_POST,
SESSION_NAME,
USER_PARTY_TIME,
USER_SEX,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SESSION_TIME,
ATTR9,
USER_ADD_TIME,
ATTR4,

CREATED_BY,
ATTR12,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,

ATTR10,
ATTR11,
ATTR16,
ATTR17,
ATTR14,
ATTR15,
CREATION_DATE,
ATTR18,
ATTR19,
USER_NAME,
USER_RANKS,
USER_TYPE,
VERSION,
ORG_IDENTITY,
SESSION_ID,
PARTY_ID,
USER_WORK_DATE,
#{userPost,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{sessionName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{userPartyTime,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

#{userWorkDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into DYN_SESSION_WYFG( USER_POST , SESSION_NAME , USER_PARTY_TIME , USER_SEX , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , SESSION_TIME , ATTR9 , USER_ADD_TIME , ATTR4 , PARTY_NAME , SESSION_TYPE , ATTR3 , ATTR2 , ATTR1 , ID , CREATED_DEPT , ATTR8 , ATTR7 , ATTR20 , LAST_UPDATE_IP , ATTR6 , ATTR5 , USER_NUMBER_VOTES , CREATED_BY , ATTR12 , LAST_UPDATED_BY , ATTR13 , ATTR10 , ATTR11 , ATTR16 , ATTR17 , ATTR14 , ATTR15 , CREATION_DATE , ATTR18 , ATTR19 , USER_NAME , USER_RANKS , USER_TYPE , VERSION , ORG_IDENTITY , SESSION_ID , PARTY_ID , USER_WORK_DATE )
select #{item.userPost,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.sessionName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.userPartyTime,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.userSex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.sessionTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.userAddTime,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.sessionType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr20,jdbcType = BLOB} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.userNumberVotes,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.userName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.userRanks,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.userType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.sessionId,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.userWorkDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update DYN_SESSION_WYFG
USER_POST = #{userPost,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
SESSION_NAME = #{sessionName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USER_PARTY_TIME = #{userPartyTime,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USER_SEX = #{userSex,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
SESSION_TIME = #{sessionTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTR9 = #{attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USER_ADD_TIME = #{userAddTime,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR4 = #{attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_NAME = #{partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
SESSION_TYPE = #{sessionType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR3 = #{attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR2 = #{attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR1 = #{attr1,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR8 = #{attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR7 = #{attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR20 = #{attr20,jdbcType = BLOB},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR6 = #{attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR5 = #{attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USER_NUMBER_VOTES = #{userNumberVotes,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR12 = #{attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR13 = #{attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR10 = #{attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR11 = #{attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR16 = #{attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR17 = #{attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR14 = #{attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR15 = #{attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTR18 = #{attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTR19 = #{attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
USER_NAME = #{userName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USER_RANKS = #{userRanks,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USER_TYPE = #{userType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
VERSION = version+1,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
SESSION_ID = #{sessionId,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
PARTY_ID = #{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USER_WORK_DATE = #{userWorkDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update DYN_SESSION_WYFG set USER_POST = #{userPost,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SESSION_NAME = #{sessionName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_PARTY_TIME = #{userPartyTime,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_SEX = #{userSex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , SESSION_TIME = #{sessionTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR9 = #{attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_ADD_TIME = #{userAddTime,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR4 = #{attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_NAME = #{partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SESSION_TYPE = #{sessionType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR3 = #{attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR2 = #{attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR1 = #{attr1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR8 = #{attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR7 = #{attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR20 = #{attr20,jdbcType = BLOB} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR6 = #{attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR5 = ATTR17 = #{attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR14 = #{attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR15 = #{attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR18 = #{attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR19 = #{attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , USER_NAME = #{userName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_RANKS = #{userRanks,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_TYPE = #{userType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SESSION_ID = #{sessionId,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , PARTY_ID = #{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_WORK_DATE = #{userWorkDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update DYN_SESSION_WYFG set USER_POST = #{item.userPost,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SESSION_NAME = #{item.sessionName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_PARTY_TIME = #{item.userPartyTime,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_SEX = #{item.userSex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , SESSION_TIME = #{item.sessionTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR9 =
